LAW AND MOTION 301, SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANTS MARLEU VINCENT AND PAULINE ARBOUR'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMON AND COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFFS HAVE NOT CARRIED THEIR BURDEN OF SHOWING PURPOSEFUL AVAILMENT GIVING RISE TO INJURY IN THIS STATE FOR CONSTITUTIONAL PURPOSES. IN ANY EVENT, THE SERVICE CHALLENGED IN THIS MOTION FAILED TO SATISFY THE HAGUE CONVENTION REQUIREMENTS. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

Off Calendar Aug-09-2011 Text Ruling

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHAEL COHEN OF THE LAW OFFICES OF BRUCE E. KRELL, TEL. NO. 861-4414 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JASON SHANE OF THE LOMBARDI ET. AL, TEL. NO. (510) 433-2600 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS AND MOVING PARTIES.
